// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import java.lang.foreign.*
import java.lang.foreign.ValueLayout.*
import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandle
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativeLoader, Scratch, Layouts, StructAbiCheck, UpcallBridge}

final class HandleBindingsImpl extends HandleBindings:
    import HandleBindingsImpl.*

    def open(path: String)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Ffi.Handle[kyo.example.golden.MyHandle] =
        val __kyoScratch$ = Scratch.currentFor("kyo.example.HandleBindings", Scratch.configuredSize)
        val __kyoMark$ = __kyoScratch$.mark()
        try
            val pathSeg = __kyoScratch$.allocUtf8(path, "kyo.example.HandleBindings", "open")
            val errnoSeg = __kyoScratch$.alloc(captureLayout.byteSize(), captureLayout.byteAlignment(), "kyo.example.HandleBindings", "open")
            val retVal: MemorySegment = openMH.invokeExact(errnoSeg, pathSeg)
            if retVal.address() == 0L then throw new kyo.ffi.FfiNullPointer("kyo.example.HandleBindings.open returned null") else Ffi.Handle.wrap(retVal)
        finally __kyoScratch$.reset(__kyoMark$)

    def close(h: Ffi.Handle[kyo.example.golden.MyHandle])(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Unit =
        val __kyoScratch$ = Scratch.currentFor("kyo.example.HandleBindings", Scratch.configuredSize)
        val __kyoMark$ = __kyoScratch$.mark()
        try
            val hSeg = kyo.ffi.internal.FfiUnsafe.expect[MemorySegment](Ffi.Handle.unwrap(h).asInstanceOf[AnyRef], classOf[MemorySegment], "MemorySegment on JVM", "kyo.example.HandleBindings", "close")
            val errnoSeg = __kyoScratch$.alloc(captureLayout.byteSize(), captureLayout.byteAlignment(), "kyo.example.HandleBindings", "close")
            val _: Unit = closeMH.invokeExact(errnoSeg, hSeg)
            ()
        finally __kyoScratch$.reset(__kyoMark$)
end HandleBindingsImpl

object HandleBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.HandleBindings")
    private val lib      = NativeLoader.load("kyo_handle")
    private val linker   = Linker.nativeLinker()
    private val capture  = Linker.Option.captureCallState("errno")
    private val captureLayout = Linker.Option.captureStateLayout()

    private val openMH: MethodHandle = linker.downcallHandle(
        lib.find("open").orElseThrow(),
        FunctionDescriptor.of(ADDRESS, ADDRESS),
        capture
    )

    private val closeMH: MethodHandle = linker.downcallHandle(
        lib.find("close").orElseThrow(),
        FunctionDescriptor.ofVoid(ADDRESS),
        capture
    )
end HandleBindingsImpl
